user.title: Connect to GHIN
user.description: Enter your GHIN.com login and the client token used by the GHIN web app. To find the token: open ghin.com in your browser, open DevTools → Network tab, log in, click the `golfer_login.json` request, and copy the `token` field from the Request Payload.

reconfigure.title: Update GHIN connection
reconfigure.description: Update your GHIN.com login or client token (for example, if GHIN has rotated the token and your sensors stopped updating).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email, password, or client token

abort.already_configured: This GHIN account is already configured
